11005.en-US: Wallet business type and business order number are required.

20005.en-US: The verification code is invalid or has expired.

20006.en-US: You're requesting email verification codes too often.

20007.zh-CN: 邮箱验证码尝试次数过多

20008.en-US: Email verification rate limiting is unavailable.

32001.en-US: This document category has child categories and cannot be deleted.

32002.en-US: This document category has articles and cannot be deleted.

32005.zh-CN: 文档分类父级不能形成循环
32005.en-US: Document category parent cannot create a cycle.

40002.zh-CN: 仅待支付租赁订单可支付
40002.en-US: Only pending-payment rental orders can be paid.

40003.zh-CN: 当前租赁订单状态不可取消
40003.en-US: The current rental order status cannot be canceled.

40004.zh-CN: 仅待激活租赁订单可支付部署费用
40004.en-US: Only pending-activation rental orders can pay deployment fees.

40005.zh-CN: 仅已暂停租赁订单可启动
40005.en-US: Only paused rental orders can be started.

40006.zh-CN: 仅运行中或已暂停租赁订单可提前结算
40006.en-US: Only running or paused rental orders can be settled early.

40007.zh-CN: 租赁订单正在处理，请稍后重试
40007.en-US: Rental order is being processed. Please try again later.

41002.zh-CN: 仅已生成的 API 凭证可激活
41002.en-US: Only generated API credentials can be activated.

41003.zh-CN: 仅已暂停 API 凭证可启动
41003.en-US: Only paused API credentials can be started.

41004.zh-CN: API 凭证未处于激活中

41103.zh-CN: API 部署订单状态已变化

41201.zh-CN: API Token 明文不能为空

41203.zh-CN: API Token 加密密钥未配置
41203.en-US: API token encryption key is not configured.

60002.zh-CN: 充值渠道已有订单引用，不能删除
60002.en-US: Top-up channel has linked orders and cannot be deleted.

60003.en-US: Top-up amount must be greater than 0.

60004.zh-CN: 充值金额低于最低金额
60004.en-US: Top-up amount is below the minimum.

60005.zh-CN: 充值订单或外部交易号重复
60005.en-US: Top-up order or external transaction number is duplicated.

60006.zh-CN: 仅已提交充值订单可取消
60006.en-US: Only submitted top-up orders can be canceled.

60007.zh-CN: 仅已提交充值订单可审核通过
60007.en-US: Only submitted top-up orders can be approved.

60008.zh-CN: 仅已提交充值订单可驳回
60008.en-US: Only submitted top-up orders can be rejected.

60014.zh-CN: 最小充值金额不能大于最大充值金额
60014.en-US: Minimum top-up amount cannot exceed the maximum.

60015.zh-CN: 充值订单正在处理，请稍后重试
60015.en-US: Top-up order is being processed. Please try again later.

70002.zh-CN: 提现金额低于最低金额
70002.en-US: Withdrawal amount is below the minimum.

70004.zh-CN: 仅待处理提现订单可取消
70004.en-US: Only pending withdrawal orders can be canceled.

70005.zh-CN: 仅待处理提现订单可审核通过
70005.en-US: Only pending withdrawal orders can be approved.

70006.zh-CN: 仅待处理或已审核提现订单可驳回
70006.en-US: Only pending or approved withdrawal orders can be rejected.

70007.zh-CN: 仅已审核提现订单可标记打款
70007.en-US: Only approved withdrawal orders can be marked as paid.

70010.zh-CN: 提现订单正在处理，请稍后重试
70010.en-US: Withdrawal order is being processed. Please try again later.
